# ArenaFlow OS - LLMs Reference

## Project Context
ArenaFlow OS is a Next.js 15+ (App Router) project providing B2B venue management and crowd flow optimization. It started as a consumer app but pivoted based on YC-style (Paul Graham) pressure testing to a Venue Operator OS.

## Technologies
- Next.js 15+ (RSC, Server Actions, native Metadata)
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Neon Serverless PostgreSQL
- Better Auth
- Drizzle ORM

## Design Language
Google-themed:
- Primary: Google Blue #4285F4
- Danger: Google Red #EA4335
- Warning: Google Yellow #FBBC05
- Success: Google Green #34A853
- Text: Deep Charcoal (#121212) on Off-White backgrounds.

## SEO/AEO/GEO Requirements
- Must target Lighthouse score 100 on all pages.
- Must include robust standard metadata and JSON-LD application schemas.
- Content structured defensively for parsing by AI answer engines.
